title: Valid Parenthesis String
description: Chuỗi ()* — * là (, ) hoặc rỗng. Có thể thành valid parentheses?
approach: Track low/high open count range after each char.
memoryTip: Valid parenthesis string — range [lo,hi] open count.

solutions.c: bool checkValidString678(char* s){ int lo=0,hi=0; for(;*s;s++){ if(*s=='('){lo++;hi++;} else if(*s==')'){lo--;hi--;} else{lo--;hi++;} if(hi<0)return 0; if(lo<0)lo=0; } return lo==0; }

analysis.correctness: Range of possible open counts — lo==0 at end feasible.
pitfalls: lo can go negative then clamp
